findings.title: Flask route '/admin/users' has no authentication decorator
findings.message: Flask route handler 'list_users' has no authentication decorator. All endpoints handling sensitive data MUST use @login_required to enforce access control per OWASP A01:2021.

findings.title: IDOR in user profile endpoint
findings.message: Object retrieved by user-supplied ID without ownership verification. An attacker can modify the ID parameter to access other users' data (IDOR).

findings.title: Path traversal in file download handler
findings.message: User-supplied input used directly in file path operation without validation. Attacker can use '../' sequences to access arbitrary files (CWE-22).

findings.title: CORS configured with wildcard origin
findings.message: CORS configured with wildcard origin '*'. This allows any website to make cross-origin requests to your API. Use an explicit allowlist of trusted origins.

findings.title: Direct role modification without authorization check
findings.message: Direct role/permission modification 'user.is_admin' without authorization check. An attacker could escalate privileges by modifying role assignments.
